R0200.title: Layer2 Bridge Risk
R0200.definition: Asset bridges between Layer2 scaling solutions (Rollup, sidechains) and mainchain have security vulnerabilities that may result in funds being locked or stolen.

references.title: Blockchain Cross-Chain Bridge Security: Challenges, Solutions, and ...

R0200.description: Asset bridges between Layer2 scaling solutions (Rollup, sidechains) and mainchain have security vulnerabilities that may result in funds being locked or stolen.
R0200.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
